summary: The diff implements PDF download functionality by generating print-optimized HTML and using the browser's print dialog to save as PDF. All three requirements (REQ-27, REQ-28, REQ-29) are substantially implemented with proper formatting, section structure, and template styling matching academic research paper conventions. All 12 research paper sections are rendered correctly.

hallucinated_features.description: Implementation uses browser print dialog (window.print()) instead of direct PDF generation
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-27 specifies 'PDF generation functionality that exports the research paper as a PDF document' and AC states 'generates and downloads a PDF file'. The implementation opens a print dialog requiring user interaction to save as PDF, rather than directly generating and downloading a PDF file programmatically.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notification displays 'Opening print dialog - save as PDF to download' message
hallucinated_features.reason: This user-facing message about the print dialog was not requested in the BuildRequest. The requirement was for direct PDF download, not a print dialog workflow.

hallucinated_features.description: Error handling for popup blocking with specific user message
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not specify error handling for popup blocking scenarios. This is additional functionality beyond what was requested.
